seoDescription: Partner with GenFix on programs that support skills, industry development, and local communities.

hero.heading: Community Sponsorship
hero.body: GenFix sponsors initiatives that strengthen technical skills, community resilience, and safer industry practices.

sections.title: What GenFix Sponsors
sections.body: We prioritise partnerships with clear community value, practical outcomes, and alignment to our operating values.

cards.title: Trade Skills Pathways
cards.description: Support for programs that build practical engineering and field-service capability.

cards.title: Community Resilience Programs
cards.description: Initiatives that improve preparedness, safety awareness, and operational confidence.

cards.title: Local Industry Events
cards.description: Partnerships that connect contractors, operators, and technical specialists around best practice.

sections.title: How Sponsorship Is Assessed
sections.body: Applications are reviewed for impact, governance, and practical alignment to GenFix values.

cards.title: Alignment To Safety And Skills
cards.description: Programs should promote safer work practices and meaningful capability development.

cards.title: Measurable Community Impact
cards.description: We prefer initiatives with clear outcomes, transparent delivery plans, and defined beneficiaries.

cards.title: Long-Term Partnership Potential
cards.description: Where possible, GenFix seeks sustained partnerships instead of one-off contributions.
